# Voidbox API

> Disposable temporary email service. Register an inbox, receive emails, read and delete them. All inboxes auto-expire after 1 hour. Powered by Cloudflare Workers + D1.

## Authentication

All API endpoints (except `/llms.txt`) require a Bearer token:

```
Authorization: Bearer <TOKEN>
```

Unauthenticated requests return `403 Forbidden`.

## Conventions

- All timestamps are **Unix seconds** (integer).
- Inbox addresses are full email format: `user@domain.com`.
- URL path parameters containing `@` must be **percent-encoded** as `%40` (e.g., `test%40domain.com`).
- All request/response bodies are JSON with `Content-Type: application/json`.
- Field names use **camelCase**.

---

## Endpoints

### GET /api/config

Returns service configuration including allowed mail domains and relay settings.

**Parameters:** None.

**Response 200:**

```json
{
  "mailDomains": ["domain.com", "*.example.com"],
  "relayEnabled": true,
  "relayDomains": ["mozmail.com", "simplelogin.com"],
  "relayInboxes": ["me@domain.com"]
}
```

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `mailDomains` | `string[]` | Allowed domains for direct inbox registration. Entries prefixed with `*.` are wildcard domains matching any subdomain. |
| `relayEnabled` | `boolean` | Whether relay email forwarding is enabled. |
| `relayDomains` | `string[]` | Allowed relay alias domains (e.g., Firefox Relay or SimpleLogin domains). Empty when `relayEnabled` is false. Relay inboxes can be registered using these domains. |
| `relayInboxes` | `string[]` | Preconfigured relay recipient addresses (the real addresses that relay services forward to). Empty when `relayEnabled` is false. Provided for UI convenience. |

---

### POST /api/inbox/{inbox}

Register a new temporary inbox. The inbox auto-expires after 1 hour.

**Path parameters:**

| Param | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `inbox` | `string` | Full email address to register (percent-encoded). Domain must be in `mailDomains` or `relayDomains`. |

**Response 201 (success):**

```json
{
  "inbox": "test@domain.com",
  "createdAt": 1711800000,
  "expiresAt": 1711803600
}
```

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `inbox` | `string` | The registered inbox address. |
| `createdAt` | `integer` | Unix timestamp when the inbox was created. |
| `expiresAt` | `integer` | Unix timestamp when the inbox will expire. |

**Error responses:**

| Status | Condition |
|--------|-----------|
| 400 | Invalid email format or domain not in allowed list. |
| 409 | Inbox already registered. |

---

### GET /api/inbox/{inbox}/status

Get the TTL status of an active inbox.

**Path parameters:**

| Param | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `inbox` | `string` | Full email address (percent-encoded). |

**Response 200:**

```json
{
  "inbox": "test@domain.com",
  "createdAt": 1711800000,
  "expiresAt": 1711803600
}
```

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `inbox` | `string` | The inbox address. |
| `createdAt` | `integer` | Unix timestamp when the inbox was created. |
| `expiresAt` | `integer` | Unix timestamp when the inbox will expire. |

**Error responses:**

| Status | Condition |
|--------|-----------|
| 404 | Inbox not found or expired. |

---

### PUT /api/inbox/{inbox}/renew

Extend the inbox TTL by 1 hour from the current time.

**Path parameters:**

| Param | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `inbox` | `string` | Full email address (percent-encoded). |

**Response 200:**

```json
{
  "inbox": "test@domain.com",
  "createdAt": 1711800000,
  "expiresAt": 1711807200
}
```

Same fields as status response, with `expiresAt` updated to now + 1 hour.

**Error responses:**

| Status | Condition |
|--------|-----------|
| 404 | Inbox not found or expired. |

---

### DELETE /api/inbox/{inbox}

Permanently delete an inbox and all its emails.

**Path parameters:**

| Param | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `inbox` | `string` | Full email address (percent-encoded). |

**Response 200:**

```json
{ "ok": true }
```

---

### DELETE /api/inbox/{inbox}/emails

Delete all emails in an inbox without removing the inbox itself. The inbox remains active.

**Path parameters:**

| Param | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `inbox` | `string` | Full email address (percent-encoded). |

**Response 200:**

```json
{ "ok": true }
```

---

### GET /api/inbox/{inbox}

List all emails in an inbox, sorted by newest first.

**Path parameters:**

| Param | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `inbox` | `string` | Full email address (percent-encoded). |

**Response 200:**

```json
{
  "emails": [
    {
      "id": "abc123",
      "from": "sender@example.com",
      "subject": "Hello",
      "receivedAt": 1711801234
    }
  ]
}
```

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `emails` | `array` | List of email summaries, newest first. |
| `emails[].id` | `string` | Unique email ID (nanoid, 10 chars). |
| `emails[].from` | `string` | Sender email address. For relay emails, this is the original sender (not the relay intermediary). |
| `emails[].subject` | `string` | Email subject line. |
| `emails[].receivedAt` | `integer` | Unix timestamp when the email was received. |

---

### GET /api/inbox/{inbox}/from/{sender}

List emails filtered by exact sender address (case-insensitive match).

**Path parameters:**

| Param | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `inbox` | `string` | Full email address (percent-encoded). |
| `sender` | `string` | Sender email address to filter by (percent-encoded). |

**Response 200:** Same format as `GET /api/inbox/{inbox}`.

---

### GET /api/mail/{inbox}/{id}

Get full email content including body text, HTML, and headers.

**Path parameters:**

| Param | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `inbox` | `string` | Full email address (percent-encoded). |
| `id` | `string` | Email ID from the listing endpoint. |

**Response 200:**

```json
{
  "id": "abc123",
  "from": "sender@example.com",
  "inbox": "test@domain.com",
  "subject": "Hello",
  "text": "Plain text body",
  "html": "<p>HTML body</p>",
  "headers": {
    "DKIM-Signature": "v=1; ...",
    "Message-ID": "<abc@example.com>"
  },
  "receivedAt": 1711801234
}
```

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `id` | `string` | Unique email ID. |
| `from` | `string` | Sender email address. For relay emails, this is the original sender. |
| `inbox` | `string` | The inbox address this email belongs to. |
| `subject` | `string` | Email subject line. |
| `text` | `string` | Plain text body (may be empty if only HTML). |
| `html` | `string` | HTML body (may be empty if only plain text). |
| `headers` | `object` | Key-value map of email headers. Keys are header names, values are string representations. |
| `receivedAt` | `integer` | Unix timestamp when the email was received. |

**Error responses:**

| Status | Condition |
|--------|-----------|
| 404 | Email not found. |

---

### DELETE /api/mail/{inbox}/{id}

Delete a single email.

**Path parameters:**

| Param | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `inbox` | `string` | Full email address (percent-encoded). |
| `id` | `string` | Email ID. |

**Response 200:**

```json
{ "ok": true }
```

---

## Relay Support

When `relayEnabled` is true, Voidbox accepts emails forwarded via relay/alias services. Relay provider is **auto-detected** from email headers:

| Provider | Detection | Inbox resolved from | Sender resolved from |
|----------|-----------|---------------------|----------------------|
| Firefox Relay | `Resent-From` header present | `From` header (mask address) | `Resent-From` header (real sender) |
| SimpleLogin | `X-SimpleLogin-Type` header present | `To` header (alias address) | `X-SimpleLogin-Original-From` header (real sender) |

Relay inboxes must be registered like normal inboxes, using a domain from `relayDomains`. If no relay headers are detected on an email arriving at a relay recipient, it falls back to normal direct delivery.

## Constraints

- Inbox TTL: 1 hour (extendable via renew, no limit on renewals)
- Max inboxes: 50 (configurable, oldest evicted via FIFO when full)
- Max emails per inbox: 100 (configurable, oldest trimmed)
- Max email size: 256 KB (configurable, oversized rejected)
- Inbox address: valid RFC 5321 email, domain must be in `mailDomains` or `relayDomains`
